query: TITLE-ABS-KEY(("weather forecast*" OR "meteorological forecast*" OR "temperature forecast*" OR "heat forecast*" OR "early warning system*" OR "heat warning*" OR "temperature alert*" OR "heat advisory" OR "extreme heat warning*") AND ("cooling center*" OR "cooling centre*" OR "heat shelter*" OR "cooling shelter*" OR "climate refuge*" OR "heat refuge*" OR "emergency shelter*" OR "public cooling" OR "air conditioning" OR "cooling intervention*" OR "heat relief" OR "cooling program*" OR "misting station*") AND ("temperature-mortality" OR "temperature-health" OR "heat-health" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat-related mortality" OR "heat-related morbidity" OR "extreme temperature*" OR heatwave* OR "heat wave*" OR "heat exposure" OR "heat illness" OR "hyperthermia" OR "heat stroke") AND ("randomized controlled trial*" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment*" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "instrumental variable*" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "causal inference" OR "causal identification" OR "treatment effect*" OR "intervention study" OR "policy evaluation" OR "random assignment" OR "exogenous variation" OR "plausibly exogenous" OR "mortality displacement" OR "health intervention*" OR "before-after" OR "pre-post" OR "interrupted time series" OR "propensity score" OR "matching" OR "evaluation study"))
